EP 5 - Learning Webpack the Hard Way: Babel
Browser support for JavaScript varies a lot, so let's add Babel to our Webpack setup. Babel compiles your JavaScript into something every browser supports.
Install Babel into your Webpack project:
language-js shiki shiki-themes github-light github-light github-dark-high-contrast
Since we moved our JS entry point, we need to update
Now let's write some real JavaScript to test:
Open the dev server first to make sure it works:

Since browser support varies for JavaScript, this post adds Babel to the Webpack setup — a tool that compiles your JavaScript into something every browser can run.
